figures_detected.description: Illustration showing disconnection of the harness
Illustration showing modulator rod and spring clip location for disconnection
Illustration showing SST KV319-K0100 (control valve holder) fitted to prevent pressure regulator valve assembly jumping out
Illustration showing fitting the regulator end of the holder first, pressing down at opposite end, locating holder around centre bolt
Illustration showing removal of valve and holder as a unit

steps.text: Remove the spring clip and disconnect the modulator rod.
Fit Tool (control valve holder) to prevent the pressure regulator valve assembly jumping out.
notes: Fit the regulator end of the holder first, then press down at the opposite end, and locate the holder around the centre bolt.

steps.text: Remove the valve and holder as a unit. Ensure that the valve and holder do not separate.
warnings: Do not disassemble the control valve.

tools_referenced.name: Control valve holder
tools_referenced.usage: Fit to prevent the pressure regulator valve assembly jumping out during disassembly
